title: Marketplace Manager - Adidas India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Adidas India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
